payload.message:
Template job. Recommended settings:
- delivery.mode=none
- use explicit notify via sessions_send and dedupe via NOTIFY_SENT events

Run: node ~/.openclaw/workspace-god/skills/agent-orchestration-system/scripts/autopilot.js --maxConcurrency=1 --opsConcurrency=2 --slaMinutes=60 --lockTtlMs=900000 --maxTotalSpawns=2
Then execute returned actions[] (spawn/complete/mismatch/stale/validation) deterministically.
